name: the moss borders
identity: A cultivated area within the settlement, characterized by moss borders and used for growing crops. It serves as a demonstration site where the player character explains their philosophy of restoring the land's ability to respond rather than forcing it.
current_status: The player character leads Elder Lyra here to demonstrate the restored balance of the land and offer her the settlement's full records on their healing methods.

purpose.value: demonstration of land restoration and cultivation
